results.title: Home away from home
results.creator_credit: Umit Ugur, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Unlike other immigrants, Umit Ugur didn’t move to Australia in 1981 for economic reasons, instead he migrated here because of love.

results.title: Australyaya Gelisiminhikayesi = Coming to Australia
results.creator_credit: Riza Guclu, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: When Riza Guclu moved to Australia with his family, he was looking for a better life, like most immigrants. With that in mind, he learnt what he need to help him succeed.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Riza Guclu, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI

results.title: Avustralyadan bir enstantane...
results.creator_credit: Bayram Ocal, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Bayram Ocal reflects on his many achievements since migrating to Australia in the late sixties, including contributing to the foundation of a Turkish Islamic society, an Islamic funeral service, a mosque and various Turkish language newspapers.

results.title: Ithal Damat = Imported groom
results.creator_credit: Huseyin Duman, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Huseyin Damat left Turkey for Australia to meet and marry his wife. Although he was sad to leave his family behind, his journey here was an eventful one, especially when he discovered he was on the same flight as Swedish super group ABBA.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Huseyin Duman, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI

results.title: New life new country
results.creator_credit: Fatma Coskun, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Fatma Coskun came from a small village amongst the mountains of Corun. However, financial hardships drove her and her husband to Australia to start a new life. Despite a major setback at the beginning of their journey, Fatma and her family consider themselves very fortunate to have settled in Australia.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Fatma Coskun, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI

results.title: Yeni hayat = New life
results.creator_credit: Kenan Besiroglu, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Kenan Besiroglu migrated to Australia with his wife and son in 1970. This is a story of hard work, perseverance and the promise of a new life.

results.title: My second home
results.creator_credit: Memet Gunes, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Memet Gunes was one of the lucky few people in his village in Turkey to receive an education. When he migrated to Australia with his family he found a place full of possibility and opportunity.

results.title: Stories from the Turkish community : Digital Storytelling project
results.creator_credit: Bayram Ocal, Fatma Coskun, Figen Hasimoglu, Huseyin Duman, Ifran Hassan, Kenan Besiroglu, Memet Gunes, Mustafa Yucel, Riza Guclu, Umit Ugur, Yusuf Hazar, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Eleven Turkish migrants, from Cyprus and Turkey, tell of their experiences migrating and making Australia their new home. They tell of the reasons for moving here, the journey to Australia and share their feelings for their family, their community and their adopted country.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Bayram Ocal, Fatma Coskun, Figen Hasimoglu, Huseyin Duman, Ifran Hassan, Kenan Besiroglu, Memet Gunes, Mustafa Yucel, Riza Guclu, Umit Ugur, Yusuf Hazar, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI

results.title: Telesport TV Pong console
results.material_description: Plastic, timber, MDF and metal (electrical components)
results.brief_description: A dedicated TV game console for playing four Pong variants: solo squash, squash, football and tennis. The console uses the AY-3-8500 dedicated pong chip and was a limited edition run by Playtech. The console settings allow the player to adjust the bat, speed and angle.
results.description: A dedicated TV game console for playing four Pong variants: solo squash, squash, football and tennis. The console uses the AY-3-8500 dedicated pong chip and was a limited edition run by Playtech. The console settings allow the player to adjust the bat, speed and angle.
description_for_label: A dedicated TV game console for playing four Pong variants: solo squash, squash, football and tennis. The console uses the AY-3-8500 dedicated pong chip and was a limited edition run by Playtech. The console settings allow the player to adjust the bat, speed and angle.
